TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Takaray a sowal ś¶āŤ¶Ā == O sinafel i 'orip no Pangcah, anca o roma finacadan, o sinafal hananay, lengaw sanay i palapalaan, lotolotokan a dategn, o sinafel i, angred, cipelak a kaenen, sanaw awaay ko fao, o rayray no paro no loma' ko sinafel, o saka'orip no lomalomaan, sakafangcal no tatireng. iti:ya ho o nipalomaan no 'Amis a kakaenen, ano i herek no pipanayan ato pipahafayan i, caay pipahanhan itiya ko sera, saka, mipaloma to masamaanay a sinafel, o kadasing, tali, 'ariray. Halo itini i fokekokelohan mipaloma to dateng. O sinafel no 'Amis/Pangcah ťėŅÁĺéśóŹÁöĄťáéŤŹú O Pangcah hananay a finacadan, lilis sa i riyar ato lotolotokan a maro', ira ko toloay a mahapingan kora kakaenen no serangawan no 'Amis/Pangcah, o saka cecay i, maolah komaen to masamaanay no i riraray a kakaenen, o cekiw, 'a'owang, foting, kalang, sorita, talapacay, ato masamaanay a rengod. Sakatosa i, ira ko makadodahay a sinafel serangawan, ira ko tatokem, o kakorot, o sokoy, o sama', o dongec, o tamorak, o fata'an, o kapayaay, o lokot, o paheko, o kalitang, o faliyasan, o 'ariray, o toto', o tefi', o saytaw, o komi'ot, o roni, o fida'ol, o naniwac, o rara, o fadas, o da^eci, o sina'osal, o lokiw, o talod, o halopal, wa:ta kaahihay kona sinafel no mita, caay sa kalepon a misiwkay. Sakatolo i, o nisasirawan a titi, ira ko siraw, tena'i no foting, masasiraway a cekiw ato talapacay. Sakatolo i, o nisasirawan a titi, ira ko siraw, tena'i no foting, masasiraway a cekiw ato talapacay. Saka tahini anini, mado'edo ho no mita ko fenek no to'as, mangalef mahapingan itini tona sinsfel, o kaolahan no 'Amis/ Pangcah.Iti:ya ho ko o 'orip no 'Amis/ Pangcah, pakoyoc ko 'orip, awaay ho ko manmaan, ano adada ko tireng ato makodic ko fanges i, talaipalapalaan midateng to masamaanay a sinafel, manga'ay ko tatirengan, o tadasafangcalay ko sinafel malasapaiyo. o talod aca o rengos sakisinafelen, sakisapaiyoen no to'as itiya ho, anini to kalacemceman to a sakalahedawan ko matiniay a fenek no to'as. Tatodong O sinafel a dateng, malecad o rengos nengnengen no tamdaw, caay ko tadamaanay a dateng, nikaorira, i kaka no nipalomaan a dateng ko katakaraw kaci'epoc, ci'epocay kakaenen a sinafel. Tadaci'epocay kakaenen ko sinafel, kadofah ko kaci'epoc nira, matongal aca ko dating no malingaday, miparayray aca to tato'asan a serangawan ato fana', malecaday to nasowalan no ising fangcalay a kakaenen ko sinafel sanay, mifasaw to cahiw ato sakatanektek no tatirengan, misafangcal to sera caka cifao ko nipalomaan, mico'ay to kasafalic no kakarayan, adihay adihay sato ko sasiroma kakaenen a dateng, matongal ko lifon no malingaday. Hasapimaan Hasapimaan no sokoy : Manga'ay mico'ay to ekang, caay kaedeng ko remes, koetengay a remes, sapina'on kakoetengay a remes, sakata^engad no mata, rawraw a adada, sakalaemang no tiring, sapipalasawad to cacefoay. Hasapimaan no sama' : O angreray, o Kietecay, o mafasaw ko sakawarak ko tatirengan, o parak to remes, ano adada ko mociw mamga'ay ira ko hasapimaan nira, o malifawa ko fi'ik, o mana'na' ko sawawaan, o naikoran no kasofoc la'ecaan, o fowah o adada no fafahiyan, o kaliwates, miadah to mana'na'ay. Hasapimaan Hasapimaan no tatokem : Maemin manga'ay malosapaiyo ko tapangan no tatokem, adihayay ko papah, kangdaway ko cengel no papah, Koengelay ko 'akawaay a tapangan, o safangcalay malasapaiyo, itini i kaciherangan, i lalo'odan, o tapangan nira halo o lamit, ano mafotfot to ko tapangan, pilien ho ko tatiihay a ca'ang ato papah, ta paicang han maicang to i manga'ay to malasapaiyo. O tatokem o kietecay, angreray, ko'esanay, ciwakay to mamang, mafasaw ko sakawarak ko tatirengan, sapacikay to remes, palasawad to lifawa, saparakat to isi' ko hasapimaan no tatokem. Hasapimaan O fadas o safangcalay nipalomaan iraay ko tan-pay-ce, tadakadofah ko weysenso, kay, tie no fadas, pidama^ to lomahaday ho a wawa, sapacikay to remes no faloco' ato sakafangcal no fitoka^ a adada. Hasapimaan no dongoc O akaway no dongec 'atekakay nikaorira, caay kanga'ay mapetek, manga'ay misateka misanga ato misanga to masamaanay a lalosidan, tinako, o takar, 'anengan, fakar, kakoyodan, manga'ay malosafalod. O tafedo nira mangaa'ay sakohawen, o lamit nira manga'ay misatingalaw to remes, mafasaw ko tatirengan, miserer to siya, manga'ay mipaadah to kawsiya. Marohemay a heci manga'ay a makaen. O akaway nira manga'ay miapoh to arika^ no tiyad, sapacikay to remes, saparakat to isi', miadah to adada no wadis. Hasapimaan no tamorak Mi'efacay to sakakofel, sapiliyas to lacaan ko tamorak, matongal to katanetek no tatirengan, mipadang to doka' maadah, adihay ko weysenso C no tamorak, matongal ko falohayay a payseciw, mapacakat ko cirekay a matayal, harakat maadah ko doka', adihay ko ő≤-ningcing, ano mapaceror a komaen, manga'ay maserer ko matadipohaw, manga'ay mingiriw, nawhani, caay katakaraw ko u-dung no tamorak, mafecol a kaenen, o sasafangcal manga'ay ano sapimingiriw to tiring.
S.PHON: == takaraj a so~uwa…ĺ ** == o~u sinaf…ô…ĺ i °o~urip no~u paŇč ¶ańß, an ¶a o~u ro~uma fina ¶a…¨~…ģan, o~u sinafa…ĺ ńßananaj, …ĺ…ôŇčaw sanaj i pa…ĺapa…ĺaan, …ĺo~uto~u…ĺo~uto~ukan a …¨~…ģat…ô*n, o~u sinaf…ô…ĺ i, aŇčr…ô…¨~…ģ, ¶ip…ô…ĺak a ka…ôn…ôn, sanaw awaaj ko~u fao~u, o~u rajraj no~u paro~u no~u …ĺo~uma ° ko~u sinaf…ô…ĺ, o~u saka °o~urip no~u …ĺo~uma…ĺo~umaan, sakafaŇč ¶a…ĺ no~u tatir…ôŇč. iti:ja ńßo~u o~u nipa…ĺo~umaan no~u °amis a kaka…ôn…ôn, ano~u i ńß…ôr…ôk no~u pipanajan ato~u pipańßafajan i, ¶aaj pipańßanńßan itija ko~u s…ôra, saka, mipa…ĺo~uma to~u masamaanaj a sinaf…ô…ĺ, o~u ka…¨~…ģasiŇč, ta…ĺi, °ariraj. ńßa…ĺo~u itini i fo~uk…ôko~uk…ô…ĺo~uńßan mipa…ĺo~uma to~u …¨~…ģat…ôŇč. o~u sinaf…ô…ĺ no~u °amis/paŇč ¶ańß ****** o~u paŇč ¶ańß ńßananaj a fina ¶a…¨~…ģan, …ĺi…ĺis sa i rijar ato~u …ĺo~uto~u…ĺo~uto~ukan a maro~u °, ira ko~u to~u…ĺo~uaj a mańßapiŇčan ko~ura kaka…ôn…ôn no~u s…ôraŇčawan no~u °amis/paŇč ¶ańß, o~u saka ¶…ô ¶aj i, mao~u…ĺańß ko~uma…ôn to~u masamaanaj no~u i riraraj a kaka…ôn…ôn, o~u ¶…ôkiw, °a °o~uwaŇč, fo~utiŇč, ka…ĺaŇč, so~urita, ta…ĺapa ¶aj, ato~u masamaanaj a r…ôŇčo~u…¨~…ģ. sakato~usa i, ira ko~u maka…¨~…ģo~u…¨~…ģańßaj a sinaf…ô…ĺ s…ôraŇčawan, ira ko~u tato~uk…ôm, o~u kako~uro~ut, o~u so~uko~uj, o~u sama °, o~u …¨~…ģo~uŇč…ô ¶, o~u tamo~urak, o~u fata °an, o~u kapajaaj, o~u …ĺo~uko~ut, o~u pańß…ôko~u, o~u ka…ĺitaŇč, o~u fa…ĺijasan, o~u °ariraj, o~u to~uto~u °, o~u t…ôfi °, o~u sajtaw, o~u ko~umi °o~ut, o~u ro~uni, o~u fi…¨~…ģa °o~u…ĺ, o~u naniwa ¶, o~u rara, o~u fa…¨~…ģas, o~u …¨~…ģa Ē…ô ¶i, o~u sina °o~usa…ĺ, o~u …ĺo~ukiw, o~u ta…ĺo~u…¨~…ģ, o~u ńßa…ĺo~upa…ĺ, wa:ta kaańßińßaj ko~una sinaf…ô…ĺ no~u mita, ¶aaj sa ka…ĺ…ôpo~un a misiwkaj. sakato~u…ĺo~u i, o~u nisasirawan a titi, ira ko~u siraw, t…ôna °i no~u fo~utiŇč, masasirawaj a ¶…ôkiw ko~u f…ôn…ôk no~u to~u °as, maŇča…ĺ…ôf mańßapiŇčan itini to~una sinsf…ô…ĺ, o~u kao~u…ĺańßan no~u °amis/ paŇč ¶ańß.iti:ja ńßo~u ko~u o~u °o~urip no~u °amis/ paŇč ¶ańß, pako~ujo~u ¶ ko~u °o~urip, awaaj no~u nipa…ĺo~umaan a …¨~…ģat…ôŇč ko~u katakaraw ka ¶i °…ôpo~u ¶, ¶i °…ôpo~u ¶aj kaka…ôn…ôn a sinaf…ô…ĺ. ta…¨~…ģa ¶i °…ôpo~u ¶aj kaka…ôn…ôn ko~u sinaf…ô…ĺ, ka…¨~…ģo~ufańß ko~u ka ¶i °…ôpo~u ¶ nira, tapaŇčan, pi…ĺi…ôn ńßo~u ko~u tatiińßaj a ¶a °aŇč ato~u papańß, ta pai ¶aŇč ńßan mai ¶aŇč to~u i maŇča °aj to~u ma…ĺasapaijo~u. o~u tato~uk…ôm o~u ki…ôt…ô ¶aj, aŇčr…ôraj, ko~u °…ôsanaj, ¶iwakaj to~u mamaŇč, mafasaw ko~u sakawarak ko~u tatir…ôŇčan, sapa ¶ikaj to~u r…ôm…ôs, pa…ĺasawa…¨~…ģ to~u …ĺifawa, saparakat to~u isi ° ko~u ńßasapimaan no~u tato~uk…ôm. ńßasapimaan o~u fa…¨~…ģas o~u safaŇč ¶a…ĺaj nipa…ĺo~umaan iraaj ko~u tan-paj- ¶…ô, ta…¨~…ģaka…¨~…ģo~ufańß ko~u w…ôjs…ônso~u, kaj, ti…ô no~u fa…¨~…ģas, pi…¨~…ģama Ē to~u …ĺo~umańßa…¨~…ģaj ńßo~u a wawa, sapa ¶ikaj to~u r…ôm…ôs no~u fa…ĺo~u ¶o~u ° ato~u sakafaŇč ¶a…ĺ no~u fito~uka Ē a a…¨~…ģa…¨~…ģa. ńßasapimaan no~u …¨~…ģo~uŇčo~u ¶ o~u akawaj no~u …¨~…ģo~uŇč…ô ¶ °at…ôkakaj nikao~urira, ¶aaj kaŇča °aj map…ôt…ôk, maŇča °aj misat…ôka misaŇča ato~u misaŇča to~u masamaanaj a …ĺa…ĺo~usi…¨~…ģan, tinako~u, o~u takar, °an…ôŇčan, fakar, kako~ujo~u…¨~…ģan, maŇča °aj ma…ĺo~usafa…ĺo~u…¨~…ģ. o~u taf…ô…¨~…ģo~u nira maŇčaa °aj sako~uńßaw…ôn, o~u …ĺamit nira maŇča °aj misatiŇča…ĺaw to~u r…ôm…ôs, mafasaw ko~u tatir…ôŇčan, mis…ôr…ôr to~u sija, maŇča °aj mipaa…¨~…ģańß to~u kawsija. maro~uńß…ômaj a ńß…ô ¶i maŇča °aj a maka…ôn. o~u akawaj nira maŇča °aj miapo~uńß to~u arika Ē no~u tija…¨~…ģ, sapa ¶ikaj to~u r…ôm…ôs, saparakat to~u isi °, mia…¨~…ģańß to~u a…¨~…ģa…¨~…ģa no~u wa…¨~…ģis. ńßasapimaan no~u tamo~urak mi °…ôfa ¶aj to~u sakako~uf…ô…ĺ, sapi…ĺijas to~u …ĺa ¶aan ko~u tamo~urak, mato~uŇča…ĺ to~u katan…ôt…ôk no~u tatir…ôŇčan, mipa…¨~…ģaŇč to~u …¨~…ģo~uka ° maa…¨~…ģańß, a…¨~…ģińßaj ko~u w…ôjs…ônso~u ¶ no~u tamo~urak, mato~uŇča…ĺ ko~u fa…ĺo~uńßajaj a pajs…ô ¶iw, mapa ¶akat ko~u ¶ir…ôkaj a mataja…ĺ, ńßarakat maa…¨~…ģańß ko~u …¨~…ģo~uka °, a…¨~…ģińßaj ko~u *-niŇč ¶iŇč, ano~u mapa ¶…ôro~ur a ko~uma…ôn, maŇča °aj mas…ôr…ôr ko~u mata…¨~…ģipo~uńßaw, maŇča °aj miŇčiriw, nawńßani, ¶aaj katakaraw ko~u o~u~u-…¨~…ģo~u~uŇč no~u tamo~urak, maf…ô ¶o~u…ĺ a ka…ôn…ôn, o~u sasafaŇč ¶a…ĺ maŇča °aj ano~u sapimiŇčiriw to~u tiriŇč.
S.FORM: == Takaray a sowal ś¶āŤ¶Ā == O sinafel i 'orip no Pangcah, anca o roma finacadan, o sinafal hananay, lengaw sanay i palapalaan, lotolotokan a dategn, o sinafel i, angred, cipelak a kaenen, sanaw awaay ko fao, o rayray no paro no loma' ko sinafel, o saka'orip no lomalomaan, sakafangcal no tatireng. iti:ya ho o nipalomaan no 'Amis a kakaenen, ano i herek no pipanayan ato pipahafayan i, caay pipahanhan itiya ko sera, saka, mipaloma to masamaanay a sinafel, o kadasing, tali, 'ariray. Halo itini i fokekokelohan mipaloma to dateng. O sinafel no 'Amis/Pangcah ťėŅÁĺéśóŹÁöĄťáéŤŹú O Pangcah hananay a finacadan, lilis sa i riyar ato lotolotokan a maro', ira ko toloay a mahapingan kora kakaenen no serangawan no 'Amis/Pangcah, o saka cecay i, maolah komaen to masamaanay no i riraray a kakaenen, o cekiw, 'a'owang, foting, kalang, sorita, talapacay, ato masamaanay a rengod. Sakatosa i, ira ko makadodahay a sinafel serangawan, ira ko tatokem, o kakorot, o sokoy, o sama', o dongec, o tamorak, o fata'an, o kapayaay, o lokot, o paheko, o kalitang, o faliyasan, o 'ariray, o toto', o tefi', o saytaw, o komi'ot, o roni, o fida'ol, o naniwac, o rara, o fadas, o da^eci, o sina'osal, o lokiw, o talod, o halopal, wa:ta kaahihay kona sinafel no mita, caay sa kalepon a misiwkay. Sakatolo i, o nisasirawan a titi, ira ko siraw, tena'i no foting, masasiraway a cekiw ato talapacay. Sakatolo i, o nisasirawan a titi, ira ko siraw, tena'i no foting, masasiraway a cekiw ato talapacay. Saka tahini anini, mado'edo ho no mita ko fenek no to'as, mangalef mahapingan itini tona sinsfel, o kaolahan no 'Amis/ Pangcah.Iti:ya ho ko o 'orip no 'Amis/ Pangcah, pakoyoc ko 'orip, awaay ho ko manmaan, ano adada ko tireng ato makodic ko fanges i, talaipalapalaan midateng to masamaanay a sinafel, manga'ay ko tatirengan, o tadasafangcalay ko sinafel malasapaiyo. o talod aca o rengos sakisinafelen, sakisapaiyoen no to'as itiya ho, anini to kalacemceman to a sakalahedawan ko matiniay a fenek no to'as. Tatodong O sinafel a dateng, malecad o rengos nengnengen no tamdaw, caay ko tadamaanay a dateng, nikaorira, i kaka no nipalomaan a dateng ko katakaraw kaci'epoc, ci'epocay kakaenen a sinafel. Tadaci'epocay kakaenen ko sinafel, kadofah ko kaci'epoc nira, matongal aca ko dating no malingaday, miparayray aca to tato'asan a serangawan ato fana', malecaday to nasowalan no ising fangcalay a kakaenen ko sinafel sanay, mifasaw to cahiw ato sakatanektek no tatirengan, misafangcal to sera caka cifao ko nipalomaan, mico'ay to kasafalic no kakarayan, adihay adihay sato ko sasiroma kakaenen a dateng, matongal ko lifon no malingaday. Hasapimaan Hasapimaan no sokoy : Manga'ay mico'ay to ekang, caay kaedeng ko remes, koetengay a remes, sapina'on kakoetengay a remes, sakata^engad no mata, rawraw a adada, sakalaemang no tiring, sapipalasawad to cacefoay. Hasapimaan no sama' : O angreray, o Kietecay, o mafasaw ko sakawarak ko tatirengan, o parak to remes, ano adada ko mociw mamga'ay ira ko hasapimaan nira, o malifawa ko fi'ik, o mana'na' ko sawawaan, o naikoran no kasofoc la'ecaan, o fowah o adada no fafahiyan, o kaliwates, miadah to mana'na'ay. Hasapimaan Hasapimaan no tatokem : Maemin manga'ay malosapaiyo ko tapangan no tatokem, adihayay ko papah, kangdaway ko cengel no papah, Koengelay ko 'akawaay a tapangan, o safangcalay malasapaiyo, itini i kaciherangan, i lalo'odan, o tapangan nira halo o lamit, ano mafotfot to ko tapangan, pilien ho ko tatiihay a ca'ang ato papah, ta paicang han maicang to i manga'ay to malasapaiyo. O tatokem o kietecay, angreray, ko'esanay, ciwakay to mamang, mafasaw ko sakawarak ko tatirengan, sapacikay to remes, palasawad to lifawa, saparakat to isi' ko hasapimaan no tatokem. Hasapimaan O fadas o safangcalay nipalomaan iraay ko tan-pay-ce, tadakadofah ko weysenso, kay, tie no fadas, pidama^ to lomahaday ho a wawa, sapacikay to remes no faloco' ato sakafangcal no fitoka^ a adada. Hasapimaan no dongoc O akaway no dongec 'atekakay nikaorira, caay kanga'ay mapetek, manga'ay misateka misanga ato misanga to masamaanay a lalosidan, tinako, o takar, 'anengan, fakar, kakoyodan, manga'ay malosafalod. O tafedo nira mangaa'ay sakohawen, o lamit nira manga'ay misatingalaw to remes, mafasaw ko tatirengan, miserer to siya, manga'ay mipaadah to kawsiya. Marohemay a heci manga'ay a makaen. O akaway nira manga'ay miapoh to arika^ no tiyad, sapacikay to remes, saparakat to isi', miadah to adada no wadis. Hasapimaan no tamorak Mi'efacay to sakakofel, sapiliyas to lacaan ko tamorak, matongal to katanetek no tatirengan, mipadang to doka' maadah, adihay ko weysenso C no tamorak, matongal ko falohayay a payseciw, mapacakat ko cirekay a matayal, harakat maadah ko doka', adihay ko ő≤-ningcing, ano mapaceror a komaen, manga'ay maserer ko matadipohaw, manga'ay mingiriw, nawhani, caay katakaraw ko u-dung no tamorak, mafecol a kaenen, o sasafangcal manga'ay ano sapimingiriw to tiring.

tiriŇč.
